creator: stephon@gmail.com
text:
Dear all,

I found that graphics/py-opencv cannot build.
It shows that "make: cannot open Makefile."

---
[/usr/ports/graphics/py-opencv]>>sudo make install clean
===>  Installing for py27-opencv-2.3.1_6
===>   py27-opencv-2.3.1_6 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/numpy/core/numeric.py - found
===>   py27-opencv-2.3.1_6 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/python2.7 - found
===>   py27-opencv-2.3.1_6 depends on executable: pkgconf - found
===>   py27-opencv-2.3.1_6 depends on shared library: opencv_legacy.2 - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if graphics/py-opencv already installed
make: cannot open Makefile.
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/py-opencv.
---

Is there any way to resolve this issue?

Thanks a lot.
